title: Corpse x Curios API Compat
description: This little mod allows you to directly equip your Curios items to the respective slots
body:
Corpse x Curios API Compat

This little mod allows you to directly equip your Curios items to the respective slots

Support is available on [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9)

![gif](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1bd427bd-aad6-44f4-ab24-2bfd7233cc59.gif)
